excerpt: The official programme page for Master of Applied Psychology (Diverse Learning Needs) lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/54057-lnf-lnp Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: Qualified candidates will be notified of their results via the eAdmission.
